name: counterexample-studio
description: A local-first property-based testing workbench for JS/TS functions.

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @counterexample-studio/core && npm run build --workspace @counterexample-studio/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @counterexample-studio/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @counterexample-studio/examples && npm run build --workspace @counterexample-studio/examples && npm run typecheck --workspace @counterexample-studio/cli
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @counterexample-studio/core && npm run test --workspace @counterexample-studio/core && npm run build --workspace @counterexample-studio/examples && npm run test --workspace @counterexample-studio/examples && npm run test --workspace @counterexample-studio/web && npm run test --workspace @counterexample-studio/cli
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @counterexample-studio/core && npm run build --workspace @counterexample-studio/examples && npm run build --workspace @counterexample-studio/cli && npm run build --workspace @counterexample-studio/web
scripts.e2e: npm run build && npm run playwright:install && playwright test
scripts.demo:examples: npm run build --workspace @counterexample-studio/core && npm run build --workspace @counterexample-studio/examples && npm run demo --workspace @counterexample-studio/examples
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run demo:examples && npm run e2e
